debug_info.goal:
n : ℕ
pSpec : ProtocolSpec n
ι : Type
oSpec : OracleSpec ι
OuterStmtIn OuterWitIn OuterStmtOut OuterWitOut InnerStmtIn InnerWitIn InnerStmtOut InnerWitOut : Type
lens : Context.Lens OuterStmtIn OuterStmtOut InnerStmtIn InnerStmtOut OuterWitIn OuterWitOut InnerWitIn InnerWitOut
outerStmtIn : OuterStmtIn
outerWitIn : OuterWitIn
R : Reduction oSpec InnerStmtIn InnerWitIn InnerStmtOut InnerWitOut pSpec
⊢ (do
      let a ← Prover.runWithLog (lens.stmt.toFunA outerStmtIn) (lens.wit.toFunA (outerStmtIn, outerWitIn)) R.prover
      (fun a => sorry) <$>
          ((simulateQ loggingOracle).toFun (Option OuterStmtOut)
                  (lens.stmt.lift outerStmtIn <$> R.verifier.verify (lens.stmt.proj outerStmtIn) a.1.1)).run.liftComp
            (oSpec + fun i => pSpec.Type ↑i)) =
    do
    let a ← Prover.runWithLog (lens.stmt.toFunA outerStmtIn) (lens.wit.toFunA (outerStmtIn, outerWitIn)) R.prover
    (fun a =>
          (((sorry.1.1.1, lens.lift (outerStmtIn, outerWitIn) sorry.1.1.2), lens.stmt.lift outerStmtIn sorry.1.2),
            sorry.2)) <$>
        ((simulateQ loggingOracle).toFun (Option InnerStmtOut)
                (R.verifier.verify (lens.stmt.toFunA outerStmtIn) a.1.1)).run.liftComp
          (oSpec + fun i => pSpec.Type ↑i)
